items.title: US reopens airspace over Texas border town, with 'no threat' to commercial flights
items.dek: The FAA had closed the airspace around El Paso for more than a week citing security measures, but then quickly said flights could resume.
items.body: The FAA had closed the airspace around El Paso for more than a week citing security measures, but then quickly said flights could resume.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Press release announcing death of Jeffrey Epstein written the day before his body was found dead.
items.dek: This is a DOJ document to announce the death of Jeffrey Epstein that can be found on the DOJ website at: EFTA00013180.pdf The document is dated August 9th, 2019
items.body: This is a DOJ document to announce the death of Jeffrey Epstein that can be found on the DOJ website at: EFTA00013180.pdf The document is dated August 9th, 2019, a day before his body was found in his cell. Letterhead of UNITED STATES ATTORNEY'S OFFICE; Southern District of New York U.S.; ATTORNEY GEOFFREY S. BERMAN submitted by /u/qjpham [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: What are Canada's gun ownership laws?
items.dek: A deadly mass shooting in British Columbia is likely to increase scrutiny of whether Canada's gun laws should be toughened.
items.body: A deadly mass shooting in British Columbia is likely to increase scrutiny of whether Canada's gun laws should be toughened.
items.author: IriLine Desk
